instructions: groot is a Bun-only TypeScript monorepo: bun/bunx only — flag any use of npm, npx, yarn, or pnpm in code, scripts, or docs. Treat .github/workflows/*, install.sh, install.ps1, and scripts/* as security-critical: flag unpinned GitHub Actions (must be full 40-char commit SHAs with version comments), overly broad workflow permissions, shell or PowerShell injection risks, downloads without checksum verification, and any secret exposure. The CLI implementation is intentionally a minimal skeleton while docs define the contract for later phases — do not penalize docs describing commands that are not implemented yet when they are clearly marked as planned.
